title: Prepare release documentation and publication wiring
description: Expanded release-facing syntax/delivery documentation, renamed the npm package to @archmap/core because archmap is already occupied, and added GitHub Pages deployment wiring for the viewer page.
decision_notes: npm view archmap shows an existing unrelated archmap@1.5.0 package, so the public package cannot be published as unscoped archmap.
The authenticated npm account has read-write access to the @archmap scope, and @archmap/core is currently unpublished.
SYNTAX.md now includes quick start, concept definitions, overlay/add-info semantics, viewer embedding, PNG export, and CDN/GitHub Pages examples.
GitHub Pages will deploy the built demo from .github/workflows/pages.yml by assembling dist, examples, docs, and notices into _site.
verification: npm view archmap name version license --json: existing archmap@1.5.0
npm view @archmap/core name version license --json: E404 / unpublished
npm pack --dry-run: @archmap/core@0.1.0 tarball includes dist, docs, examples, LICENSE, and THIRD_PARTY_NOTICES.md
handoff: Next external side effects: create/push GitHub repository, publish @archmap/core@0.1.0 to npm, and let GitHub Pages deploy from the pushed workflow.
If npm publish requires OTP/MFA, pause and request the OTP from the human.
